title: Discord Server Invite
description: A Minecraft Plugin, That Can Help People Find Your Discord Server By Using /discord! Fully Customizable Via The config.yml
body: ## Overview **Fully Working Discord Server Invite Command** Just Like On **DonutSMP**! **Command(s):** /discord ![/discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a4c97947edf01e441a7fd53401ea3670405995.png) ### Fully Customizable: - Command's Sound - Command's Message - Command's Cooldown **Cooldown:** ![Cooldown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e85e2f55be12f4caec58a4a8c8033ff8a9605e9.png)
